title: Accessible Modal Dialog
description: A reusable modal component built with semantic HTML and vanilla JavaScript.

title: Filterable List
description: Search and filter items in real time using JavaScript.

title: Sortable Table
description: Click column headers to sort rows by text or numeric values.

title: Copy to Clipboard
description: Copy text or URLs with user feedback and accessible messaging.

title: Toast Notification System
description: Display temporary messages that automatically dismiss after a delay.

title: Multi-Step Form
description: Guide users through a form in multiple steps with validation.
